ingredients_text: Dark chocolate 65% (cocoa mass, sugar, cocoa butter, sunflower lecithin (emulsifier)), caramel 35% (glucose syrup, sweetened condensed milk (condensed milk, sugar), sunflower oil, sugar, invert sugar syrup, caramelized sugar syrup, butter oil (milk), water, salt natural flavoring).
product_name: Dark chocolate salted caramel thins chocolate, dark chocolate salted caramel thins
